target.title: Fix Workboard card status persistence
target.body:
Fixes #88592

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Workboard linked cards could bounce away from an explicit operator status change because stale linked-session lifecycle sync rewrote the card after drag/edit saves.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, branch `codex/workboard-persist-running`, Node 24.15.0, using the production Workboard UI controller functions from `ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran a direct `pnpm exec tsx --eval` command that imports `getWorkboardState`, `moveWorkboardCard`, and `syncWorkboardLifecycle`; it moves a linked card to `running`, then replays a stale completed-session lifecycle sync and prints the final card state plus gateway methods requested.

Evidence after fix:
```console
$ pnpm exec tsx --eval "import { getWorkboardState, moveWorkboardCard, syncWorkboardLifecycle } from './ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts'; /* drag linked card to running, then replay stale done lifecycle */"
{
  "finalStatus": "running",
  "finalPosition": 2000,
  "requestMethods": [
    "workboard.cards.move"
  ],
  "updateWasCalled": false
}
```

Observed result after fix: the card remains `running` at the moved position and lifecycle sync does not issue a rewriting `workboard.cards.update` call, so the explicit user drag is preserved instead of bouncing back.

What was not tested: no live browser recording was captured; the proof exercises the real local Workboard controller path and request methods directly.

## Supplemental validation

- Fixed the ClawSweeper review finding by only marking manual status overrides when a move changes persisted status; same-status/position-only moves keep following linked lifecycle sync.
- Added controller regressions for edit-modal status save, drag-to-running preservation, and same-status move lifecycle following.
- Added view regression proving returned card state is reflected after save and still appears when the edit modal is reopened.
- Re-ran focused UI tests after the review fix: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts` passed, 78 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.

@clawsweeper re-review
